title: TTC Library
contentHtml:
MCF TTC-library

E-Libraries lead the way to digital citizenship. It should be the first places where most advanced technologies are implemented. Today, libraries are not only about lending books. But they are creative spaces, not only for individuals,but also for teams. They are economic incubators and learning hubs.

       Most of all, the e- libraries are the entry points to the digital world. They are the way to embrace technology and avoid digital exclusion. E-library of TTC will helpful to provide vast resources related to latest technological development in the area of interest on one click round the clock. This will same requirement of physical sharing of record and thus large number of employee can take benefit at save time.
contentMarkdown:
#### MCF TTC-library

E-Libraries lead the way to digital citizenship. It should be the first places where most advanced technologies are implemented. Today, libraries are not only about lending books. But they are creative spaces, not only for individuals,but also for teams. They are economic incubators and learning hubs.

       Most of all, the e- libraries are the entry points to the digital world. They are the way to embrace technology and avoid digital exclusion. E-library of TTC will helpful to provide vast resources related to latest technological development in the area of interest on one click round the clock. This will same requirement of physical sharing of record and thus large number of employee can take benefit at save time.
